notes: Sprint 106 - Framework 6.0.0 Specification Standard (SPEC-0002). This is a DOCUMENTATION STANDARD, not a code feature. Defines unified format for technical specifications with YAML frontmatter, behavior-driven requirements, and structured acceptance criteria. CLI complete (spec command, spec frontmatter validator). Implementation evidence: (1) All specs in docs/02-design/14-Technical-Specs/ follow this standard (YAML frontmatter, BDD format, tier classification), (2) JSON schema backend/sdlcctl/sdlcctl/schemas/spec-evidence-schema.json enforces structure, (3) CLI validator ensures compliance. All 15+ SPECs use this standard consistently.
